name: Chicken with Cherry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the chicken breasts with peppercorns and coriander.
2. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Add chicken breasts and sauté until browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes per side. Remove from skillet.
4. Add sugar, lemon juice, and white wine to the skillet. Reduce until a syrup forms.
5. Stir in stock and brandy. Simmer together until sauce is slightly thickened.
6. Stir in cherries.
7. Return chicken and any juices to the skillet to reheat. Serve 4.
